summary: Re-tested the P0 user-reported bug: 'il preventivo non si salva quando si parte dal flusso Configuratore Esigenze'. Performed E2E browser-driven verification: login admin@admin.it -> /configuratoreesigenze -> step 1 Dati Cliente (name+mq filled, anno_costruzione INTENTIONALLY LEFT EMPTY to re-test the 422 fix) -> step 2 answered all 16/16 esigenze questions -> step 3 Risultato shows ELITE (CONSIGLIATO, €117.000) and PREMIUM (alternative, €90.351) with 4 EXTRA INCLUSI (Massetto per alleggerito €3645, Caldaia condensazione €1944, Impianto pavimento €7290, Pannello porta blindata €972, Totale extra €13.851). Clicked alternative-pkg-preventivo-btn (Inizia Preventivo on PREMIUM). Saved via 'Salva preventivo'. ALL PRIMARY ASSERTIONS PASS.

preventivo_api_response.verification: Base 71100 + Extras 13851 = Subtotal 84951; IVA 10% = 8495.10; Total 93446.10 - matches displayed values

p0_flow_results.conforme_badge_step7_riepilogo: PASS - Badge text 'Conforme al pacchetto PREMIUM scelto in fase di consulenza (Configuratore Esigenze)' visible on Riepilogo screen (data-testid not explicitly verified but text confirmed via DOM and screenshot)
p0_flow_results.package_id: PREMIUM (alternative pkg) - confirmed in API response and UI header 'PREMIUM'

issues: MQ field has placeholder '80' and Anno costruzione has placeholder '1980' but neither has a default value - users may submit confusingly empty inputs that look pre-filled

tests_not_executed: Bagno surcharge (preventivo bagno without tier) - skipped due to token budget; primary P0 flow took priority. Recommended for next iteration: open /preventivobagno, do not select a tier, verify subtotale = Base + Extra + Optional (no negative). Per main agent context the fix is in place.
CAD: editing W/P/H of mobili - skipped
Prospetti pareti: 'Modifica posizioni e altezze' inputs + 'Salva modifiche' toast - skipped
action_items: P0 bug RESOLVED and verified end-to-end. Main agent can self-test the residual items (bagno surcharge, CAD, prospetti, floorplan import) using the same admin login.

Optional: explicitly add a data-testid='conforme-badge' attribute on the badge wrapper - currently we can only confirm via text content. The brief mentioned that testid; the badge IS rendered correctly but its data-testid was not visible in the DOM scan.
critical_code_review_comments: ConfiguratoreEsigenze.jsx step 1 button data-testid='ce-next-step' - same testid is reused later for 'Vedi risultato' on step 2 which makes selectors ambiguous; observed that Vedi risultato did not respond to ce-next-step locator (timeout). Consider unique testids per step (e.g. ce-step1-next, ce-step2-see-result).
Lead anno_costruzione sanitization confirmed working - empty string -> null works. Good fix.
Salvataggio preventivo correctly sets package_id from configuratore (alternative=PREMIUM) and injects 4 from_configuratore=true items under category 'EXTRA'.
seed_data_creation: Created during test: 1 lead (id=cad-preventivi-live) and 1 preventivo PRV-2026-0013 (id=cad-preventivi-live) with package_id=PREMIUM, 25 items (4 from_configuratore EXTRA), totale_iva_incl=93446.10. Plus a couple of orphan leads from earlier test attempts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Configuratore -> Preventivo P0 flow is GREEN (verified PRV-2026-0013, 93446 EUR, 4 fc EXTRA items, badge present, both toasts shown). Selectors used: input[placeholder='Mario'], input[placeholder='Rossi'], input[placeholder*='mario@'], input[placeholder='80'] (mq), [data-testid=ce-next-step] (step1 next), button[data-testid^='ce-q-'] (esigenze options - filter out next/prev), text 'Vedi risultato' (step2 final - ce-next-step does NOT work here), [data-testid=alternative-pkg-preventivo-btn] / primary-pkg-preventivo-btn, text 'Salva preventivo' to save. Iteration 2 backend success (28/28) still stands; no backend regressions observed.
rca_of_the_issue: Original RCA per main agent: (1) StrictMode dev double-mount cleared sessionStorage too early, (2) saveLead Pydantic 422 on anno_costruzione=''. Both fixes verified live: lead now POSTs 200 with empty anno_costruzione, preventivo navigation+save completes with 4 EXTRA items injected from configuratore extras, sessionStorage prefill survives StrictMode mount cycle (via useRef applied flag and from_configuratore items).
